phoneticUs: 藢si藧kw蓹藞stre瑟蕛n; 藢sekw蓹藞stre瑟蕛n
examples: Johnson is still analyzing data on carbon sequestration patterns.
Congress has a year to take evasive action before sequestration bites.
Within this battle, the fiscal hawks are OK with sequestration. The hawkish hawks are not.
However, in light of ongoing state budget and sequestration cuts, mental health services continue to erode.
Was it planned long before the sequestration actually went through that you would do this?
